# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
139/tcp   open  netbios-ssn   Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn

445/tcp   open  microsoft-ds?
```

# Enumeration


- 総合列挙
	- enum4linuxも失敗
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ smbmap -H hokkaido-aerospace.com                                         

    ________  ___      ___  _______   ___      ___       __         _______
   /"       )|"  \    /"  ||   _  "\ |"  \    /"  |     /""\       |   __ "\
  (:   \___/  \   \  //   |(. |_)  :) \   \  //   |    /    \      (. |__) :)
   \___  \    /\  \/.    ||:     \/   /\   \/.    |   /' /\  \     |:  ____/
    __/  \   |: \.        |(|  _  \  |: \.        |  //  __'  \    (|  /
   /" \   :) |.  \    /:  ||: |_)  :)|.  \    /:  | /   /  \   \  /|__/ \
  (_______/  |___|\__/|___|(_______/ |___|\__/|___|(___/    \___)(_______)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
SMBMap - Samba Share Enumerator v1.10.7 | Shawn Evans - ShawnDEvans@gmail.com
                     https://github.com/ShawnDEvans/smbmap

[*] Detected 1 hosts serving SMB                                                                                                  
[*] Established 1 SMB connections(s) and 0 authenticated session(s)                                                          
[!] Access denied on 192.168.151.40, no fun for you...                                                                       
[*] Closed 1 connections         
```

- smbの列挙
```sh
netexec smb $TargetIP --shares
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                        
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] Error enumerating shares: STATUS_USER_SESSION_DELETED

┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/ProvingGrounds/Hokkaido]
└─$ netexec smb $TargetIP -u guest -p '' --shares
netexec smb $TargetIP -u anonymous -p '' --shares
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                                                                                                      
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] hokkaido-aerospace.com\guest: STATUS_ACCOUNT_DISABLED 
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:DC) (domain:hokkaido-aerospace.com) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)                                                                                                                                                      
SMB         192.168.151.40  445    DC               [-] hokkaido-aerospace.com\anonymous: STATUS_LOGON_FAILURE 

```

- 認証情報が必要
